rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Civ. Prac. & Rem. Code §76.001, which defines terms for agricultural crop donation and gleaning. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: "Donate" means to give without requiring anything of monetary value from the recipient.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
